items.title: Introduction to Statistical Learning (James et al.)
items.author: Gareth James, Daniela Witten, Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani
items.note: Chapters on classification and linear models connect Gaussian, Bernoulli, and logistic/Categorical views.

items.title: SciPy stats module documentation
items.author: SciPy Developers
items.note: Reference for `.pmf`, `.pdf`, `.cdf`, and fitting for Binomial, Poisson, Normal, and related distributions.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Exponential-family distributions, generative models, and links between likelihoods and ML objectives.
